blockingIssues.description: Line 107: ExtractionConfig defaults store_path to `.skills` but AGENTS.md specifies user-extensible skills should be in `.swell/skills/`. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 14).
Line 139: TrajectoryAnalyzer has #[allow(dead_code)] attribute and its store field is never used for database lookups. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 14).
Line 955: Confidence calculation uses sum of all pattern frequencies (frequency_map.values().sum()) as denominator instead of per-pattern frequency. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 14).

Line 1145: Convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. For input '- **name**: description', position 0='-', 1=' ', 2='*', 3='*', 4='n'. Name starts at index 4. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 14).
Line 1170: get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub returning empty vec with comment 'For MVP, return empty'. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 14).
blockingIssues.evidence: crates/swell-memory/src/pattern_learning.rs: Ok(Vec::new()) with 'For MVP, return empty' comment

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: CRITICAL: 5 blocking issues have persisted for 14 rounds without resolution across 2 features (memory-skill-extraction, memory-pattern-learning). These are well-identified, localized bugs with exact line numbers and clear fix instructions. The orchestrator created fix-memory-blocking-issues (pending) but no worker has completed it. HIGH-PRIORITY: Assign a dedicated worker to fix-memory-blocking-issues with explicit requirement to fix each listed issue. Do not allow re-runs of scrutiny until the fix feature is completed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 5 issues marked 'STILL NOT FIXED since round 1' with file:line evidence. No code changes made to address these issues across 14 rounds. Workers correctly implement features but introduce logic bugs that tests don't catch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Blocking issues are pure code correctness bugs that do not cause test failures. Consider adding specific validation checks or stricter code review requirements for features that have known blocking issues. Current scrutiny loop cycles without resolution because workers follow the same Rust skill procedure and produce the same buggy code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature builds and tests pass but correctness bugs persist (wrong slice index, unused field, wrong denominator).
